## IQGeo Naming Conventions

**Purpose**: Verify all code follows IQGeo naming standards

- [ ] CHK001 All controller classes use `MywController` base class
- [ ] CHK002 All model classes use `MywDDFeature` prefix
- [ ] CHK003 All test suites inherit from `Myw*TestSuite` base classes
- [ ] CHK004 Python methods use snake_case (new code) or camelCase (legacy compatibility)
- [ ] CHK005 JavaScript classes use Myw prefix for complex components
- [ ] CHK006 Module classes properly extend base classes with super() calls

## Security & Authorization

**Purpose**: Ensure all security patterns are properly implemented

- [ ] CHK007 All controller methods start with `request.user.assertAuthorized(action, resource)`
- [ ] CHK008 No raw SQL queries - all queries use SQLAlchemy ORM
- [ ] CHK009 File paths validated with `pathlib.Path.resolve()`
- [ ] CHK010 User input sanitization implemented for all endpoints
- [ ] CHK011 CSRF protection enabled on state-changing routes
- [ ] CHK012 Proper exception handling with Pyramid HTTP exceptions
- [ ] CHK013 Security events logged to audit trail

## Module Architecture _(if applicable)_

**Purpose**: Verify module integration follows IQGeo patterns

- [ ] CHK014 Module directory structure matches core exactly
- [ ] CHK015 Module registered in `modules/{customer}/__init__.py`
- [ ] CHK016 Static assets in `/static/modules/{module}/` directory
- [ ] CHK017 Module config.json properly configured
- [ ] CHK018 Base class overrides call super() methods appropriately
- [ ] CHK019 Module-specific auth patterns implemented if needed
- [ ] CHK020 Module doesn't modify core files directly

## Spatial Implementation _(if applicable)_

**Purpose**: Validate PostGIS and spatial query patterns

- [ ] CHK021 All proximity queries use `func.ST_DWithin()` not ST_Distance
- [ ] CHK022 SRID specified for all spatial operations (typically 4326)
- [ ] CHK023 GIST indexes created for all geometry columns
- [ ] CHK024 `func.ST_MakeEnvelope()` used for bounding boxes
- [ ] CHK025 `func.ST_Transform()` used for coordinate transformations
- [ ] CHK026 Spatial query performance meets <500ms for 10k features
- [ ] CHK027 Map rendering achieves 60fps pan/zoom

## Testing Framework

**Purpose**: Ensure tests follow IQGeo custom framework

- [ ] CHK028 GUI tests inherit from `MywGuiTestSuite` or `MywGuiPlaywrightTestSuite`
- [ ] CHK029 Controller tests inherit from `MywControllerTestSuite`
- [ ] CHK030 CLI tests inherit from base `MywTestSuite`
- [ ] CHK031 Reference results stored in `resources/test_results/`
- [ ] CHK032 Test cleanup implemented in tearDown/destroy methods
- [ ] CHK033 Mocks used for external dependencies
- [ ] CHK034 Test coverage >80% for new features
- [ ] CHK035 Integration tests for all API endpoints

## Frontend Implementation

**Purpose**: Validate React/MobX patterns

- [ ] CHK036 React components use TypeScript for new code
- [ ] CHK037 MobX observer pattern implemented correctly
- [ ] CHK038 Ant Design components used for UI consistency
- [ ] CHK039 OpenLayers accessed via proxy pattern
- [ ] CHK040 Legacy Backbone.js compatibility maintained where needed
- [ ] CHK041 Bundle splitting configured in webpack
- [ ] CHK042 Lazy loading implemented for heavy components

## Backend Implementation

**Purpose**: Verify Pyramid/SQLAlchemy patterns

- [ ] CHK043 Pyramid @view_config decorators used correctly
- [ ] CHK044 SQLAlchemy models extend appropriate base classes
- [ ] CHK045 Database migrations in `db_schema/upgrades/{version}/`
- [ ] CHK046 Redis caching implemented for frequently accessed data
- [ ] CHK047 Session storage uses Redis not in-memory
- [ ] CHK048 RESTful API conventions followed
- [ ] CHK049 Error responses use appropriate HTTP status codes

## Performance Requirements

**Purpose**: Validate performance targets are met

- [ ] CHK050 API response time <200ms p95
- [ ] CHK051 Spatial queries complete <500ms for 10k features
- [ ] CHK052 Map rendering maintains 60fps during pan/zoom
- [ ] CHK053 System supports 1000+ concurrent users
- [ ] CHK054 Database queries optimized with proper indexes
- [ ] CHK055 N+1 query problems eliminated
- [ ] CHK056 Memory usage remains stable under load

## Documentation & Code Quality

**Purpose**: Ensure maintainability standards

- [ ] CHK057 JSDoc comments for JavaScript/TypeScript code
- [ ] CHK058 Python docstrings follow Google style
- [ ] CHK059 Module README.md documents customizations
- [ ] CHK060 API documentation generated and accurate
- [ ] CHK061 Complex business logic documented inline
- [ ] CHK062 Configuration options documented
- [ ] CHK063 Breaking changes noted in migration guide

## Deployment Readiness

**Purpose**: Validate deployment requirements

- [ ] CHK064 Build passes: `npm run build`
- [ ] CHK065 Tests pass: `npm run test-client && npm run test-server`
- [ ] CHK066 Linting passes: `npm run lint && black server/`
- [ ] CHK067 Type checking passes: `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] CHK068 Database migrations tested and reversible
- [ ] CHK069 Feature flags configured if needed
- [ ] CHK070 Monitoring/logging instrumentation added

## Jira Integration _(if applicable)_

**Purpose**: Ensure proper ticket tracking

- [ ] CHK071 Acceptance criteria from Jira ticket met
- [ ] CHK072 All sub-tasks completed and linked
- [ ] CHK073 Test evidence attached to ticket
- [ ] CHK074 Documentation links added to ticket
- [ ] CHK075 Related tickets updated with dependencies

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially (CHK###) for easy reference
- Use `N/A` for items not applicable to your feature
- Add custom items specific to your feature as needed
